_publications._publicationTitle: Canonical Wnt/β-catenin signaling drives human schwann cell transformation, progression, and tumor maintenance.

_contextSnippet: Knockdown of either CTNNB1 or TNKS reduced cell viability and anchorage-independent growth in both S462-TY and STS-26T cells
details: Reduced cell viability and anchorage-independent growth in S462-TY and STS-26T cells
